name: Lone Star Pawn Shop
description_short: Lone Star Pawn Shop operates an eBay store selling surplus inventory and liquidated merchandise across multiple categories rather than offering traditional pawn or lending services.
description_long: Lone Star Pawn Shop, based in Grand Prairie, Texas, maintains a significant presence as an eBay reseller with 70,000+ items sold and a 99.9% positive feedback rating. Despite being categorized as a pawn shop, the company's actual online operations focus entirely on e-commerce through their eBay store, selling secondhand and liquidated goods rather than providing pawn loans or collateral-based lending services. The store has built substantial seller credibility with 2,900 followers and consistent positive customer reviews, indicating reliable transaction history and customer satisfaction with merchandise quality and shipping. However, the website content reveals no information about traditional pawn shop services such as collateral loans, gold/jewelry buying, firearm sales, or other in-store pawn operations that would typically define a pawn shop business.
address: 733 W Jefferson St, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

company_info.headquarters: 733 W Jefferson St, Grand Prairie, TX 75051

pros: Exceptional seller rating of 99.9% positive feedback with 70,000+ transactions
Large inventory of 70,000+ items across diverse product categories
Strong customer base with 2,900 followers indicating trusted seller status
Wide variety of inventory categories including electronics, collectibles, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Established eBay store presence suggesting reliable logistics and customer service
cons: No evidence of traditional pawn shop services, collateral loans, or lending products on the website
Website lacks any financial services information, loan terms, or lending capabilities
The eBay store format does not support real-time pawn valuations or in-person services typical of brick-and-mortar pawn shops
No contact information, location details, or customer service channels visible on the eBay store page
Miscategorization suggests the business may operate differently than represented, or pawn operations occur offline only
best_for: eBay shoppers seeking discounted secondhand merchandise and liquidated inventory
Buyers interested in collectibles, electronics, and specialty items from a high-feedback seller
Consumers seeking reliable e-commerce transactions with proven positive seller history
diagnosis: This company is best for online shoppers seeking discounted merchandise from a highly-rated eBay reseller, not for consumers needing pawn loans, collateral-based lending, or traditional pawn shop services. The critical caveat is that the website contains zero evidence of actual pawn shop lending operations—only eBay-based merchandise sales—suggesting either a miscategorization or that pawn services operate entirely offline.
services: Toys, games, and hobby items sales
meta_description: Lone Star Pawn Shop operates an eBay store selling surplus inventory and liquidated merchandise across multiple categories.
